$Comment: Barebones player following functionality with teleporting when out of range

MasterTargetSlot.Description: Target slot used to track the owner/master.

FollowLockOnRange.Description: Range used to retain/refresh the owner lock target for follow orchestration.

FollowSeekRange.Description: Distance threshold where seek is used; outside this threshold, teleport fallback is used.

FollowSeekSlowDownDistance.Description: How far from the master to start slowing down when seeking.

FollowSeekStopDistance.Description: How far from the master to stop when seeking.

FollowSeekRelativeSpeed.Description: Relative speed used when seeking the master.

Content.$Comment: Simple Follow State: Seek the master and teleport if too far away.
